scripts.login: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-bridge.js login
scripts.import-openclaw: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-bridge.js import-openclaw
scripts.status: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-bridge.js status
scripts.listen: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-bridge.js listen
scripts.send: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-bridge.js send
scripts.send-media: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-bridge.js send-media
scripts.service:install: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-service.js install
scripts.service:start: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-service.js start
scripts.service:stop: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-service.js stop
scripts.service:restart: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-service.js restart
scripts.service:status: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-service.js status
scripts.service:uninstall: npm run build --silent && node dist/weixin-service.js uninstall
